<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Equality; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\GreaterOrEqual; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\Smaller; class SmallerToGreaterOrEqual extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Equality'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Converts the smaller operator to the greater or equal operator.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' if ($a < $b) { // [tl! remove] if ($a >= $b) { // [tl! add] // ... } DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Smaller::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Smaller $node */ return new GreaterOrEqual($node->left, $node->right); } }
